$comment: THE CODE CONNECT SUBSTITUTE (PEA-219 agent enablement). Curated semantic bridge: how each Figma component (figma-snapshot-components.json) is built with the REAL React components in packages/cw-design-system-ts/src/components/ui (import via @coherence/design-system/ui/<name>; the 2 workstation-only reactOnly entries HelpTip/VizCard stay in desktop/src/components/ui as @/components/ui/<name>). Entry kinds: props (cva-backed prop mapping) | alias (fixed-prop projection of another entry) | recipe (composition template) | blocked (do not build — ask) | reactOnly / notInFigma (code-side markers, no Figma twin). Per-value mapping kinds: prop (React enum value) | pseudo (hover/focus — baked into classes, NEVER a prop) | attr (HTML/React attribute) | children (icon/text/slot composition) | class (utility classes) | ignore | unsupported (STOP and ask). Enforced by scripts/check_component_map_drift.mjs (A code↔map, B map↔snapshot, C bijection, D recipes resolve). Agents: resolve EVERY Figma instance through this file — a component not in here does not exist YET. Don't recreate what's already here; a genuinely new component is welcome, but it arrives flagged + registered via CONVENTIONS §7 (component + story + §2 row + an entry here, in the same PR) — never as an unregistered inline lookalike (§7/§9).
iconRule: Figma 'Icon / <kebab-name>' instances (and INSTANCE_SWAP icon slots) map to lucide-react PascalCase imports: Icon / chevron-right → <ChevronRight/>. Apply foreground via the kit's icon convention; never recolor data-vis.

Open.note: open item → set Accordion defaultValue to this item

Accordion Trigger (Bordered).structure: bordered accordion → className="rounded-3xl border" on AccordionItem (per the PEA-219 radius reconcile: Accordion → radius-3xl)

First.note: first/last rounding handled by the bordered-group classes

Middle.note: first/last rounding handled by the bordered-group classes

Last.note: first/last rounding handled by the bordered-group classes

Single.note: first/last rounding handled by the bordered-group classes

Show Icon.note: true → leading lucide icon child (Alert grid-positions it)

Show Button.note: true → trailing action button (absolute top-3 right-3 idiom)

True.note: icon-on-right alert has no code idiom; STOP and ask

⮑ Icon.note: Icon / <name> → lucide-react PascalCase import as a child

Area chart.note: §6 hard rule: data-vis is out of scope for kit migrations — no Recharts/chart primitives were installed, and the data-vis palette is off-limits. STOP and ask before building any chart.

Focus.note: focus-visible ring — baked in; never a prop

Round.note: No code equivalent — the kit is rounded-md only. Flag to the user; do not approximate with rounded-round.

⮑ Icon left.note: Icon / <name> → lucide-react PascalCase import as a child

⮑ Icon right.note: Icon / <name> → lucide-react PascalCase import as a child

codeOnly.variant=link: code-only link badge; no Figma twin

Bar chart.note: §6 hard rule: data-vis is out of scope for kit migrations — no Recharts/chart primitives were installed, and the data-vis palette is off-limits. STOP and ask before building any chart.

Even.note: zebra striping via even:bg-* if the design shows it

Extra Large.note: No code size beyond lg. STOP and ask — do not approximate with lg.

Hover & Active.note: CSS :hover/:active — baked in; never a prop

Focus.note: focus-visible ring — baked in; never a prop

Round.note: No code equivalent — the kit is rounded-md only. Flag to the user; do not approximate with rounded-round.

⮑ Right icon.note: Icon / <name> → lucide-react PascalCase import as a child

⮑ Left icon.note: Icon / <name> → lucide-react PascalCase import as a child

codeOnly.variant=link: Figma models this as the separate 'Link Button' component
codeOnly.size=icon|icon-xs|icon-sm|icon-lg: Figma models these as the separate 'Icon Button' component

Button Group.structure: <ButtonGroup>{<Button variant="outline|ghost"> × N}</ButtonGroup> — this Figma set is ONE segment; Position is automatic in code. Since 2026-06-11 each Figma child nests a real Button instance (exposed): label + icons are edited on the nested Button, not via group-level props.
Button Group.note: code-only: buttonGroupVariants orientation=vertical has no Figma twin

Left.note: segment position — automatic from composition order

Middle.note: segment position — automatic from composition order

Right.note: segment position — automatic from composition order

Single.note: segment position — automatic from composition order

Focus.note: focus-visible ring — baked in; never a prop

Hover.note: CSS :hover — baked into the component classes; never a prop

Button Group Icon Button.note: a ButtonGroup segment whose Button child is icon-only (size icon-*).

Chart.note: §6 hard rule: data-vis is out of scope for kit migrations — no Recharts/chart primitives were installed, and the data-vis palette is off-limits. STOP and ask before building any chart.

Focus.note: focus-visible ring — baked in; never a prop

Error Focus.note: focus ring in error state — baked in (aria-invalid + focus-visible)

Checkbox Group.structure: stacked/inline Checkbox + Label rows — <Field orientation="horizontal"> per row

⮑ Icon.note: Icon / <name> → lucide-react PascalCase import as a child

HelpTip (react).note: workstation custom (glossary tooltips); no Figma twin yet.

Icon Badge.structure: <ItemMedia variant="icon"><Icon/></ItemMedia> (kept separate from Badge by user ruling)

Icon Button.note: Figma Sizes → code icon sizes: Mini→icon-xs, Small→icon-sm, Default→icon, Large→icon-lg. Icon INSTANCE_SWAP → lucide child. Variant/State/Roundness follow the Button entry.

Input.note: input-group.tsx is the composition surface for decorated inputs (not yet in Figma as its own set)

Large.note: no code size; STOP and ask

Small.note: no code size; STOP and ask

Mini.note: no code size; STOP and ask

Focus.note: focus-visible ring — baked in; never a prop

Error Focus.note: focus ring in error state — baked in (aria-invalid + focus-visible)

Round.note: No code equivalent — the kit is rounded-md only. Flag to the user; do not approximate with rounded-round.

Focus.note: focus-visible ring — baked in; never a prop

Error Focus.note: focus ring in error state — baked in (aria-invalid + focus-visible)

Round.note: No code equivalent — the kit is rounded-md only. Flag to the user; do not approximate with rounded-round.

Focus.note: focus-visible ring — baked in; never a prop

Error Focus.note: focus ring in error state — baked in (aria-invalid + focus-visible)

Hover.note: CSS :hover — baked into the component classes; never a prop

Inline.note: layout decided by the parent Field orientation

Legend.note: §6 hard rule: data-vis is out of scope for kit migrations — no Recharts/chart primitives were installed, and the data-vis palette is off-limits. STOP and ask before building any chart.

Line chart.note: §6 hard rule: data-vis is out of scope for kit migrations — no Recharts/chart primitives were installed, and the data-vis palette is off-limits. STOP and ask before building any chart.

Link Button.note: Sizes map like Button (Mini→xs, Small→sm, Default→default, Large→lg); icons → children.

Loading Button.note: Button + <Spinner> leading child + disabled while loading. Sizes map like Button.

Menu.structure: the dropdown surface — SelectContent / DropdownMenuContent / PopoverContent depending on the trigger context

Menu Item.structure: <SelectItem value=…> / <DropdownMenuItem> per context; destructive → DropdownMenuItem variant="destructive"

Selected.note: selected = Select value match / DropdownMenuCheckboxItem checked

True.note: set RadioGroup defaultValue to this item

Focus.note: focus-visible ring — baked in; never a prop

Error Focus.note: focus ring in error state — baked in (aria-invalid + focus-visible)

True.note: checkbox on the right — reverse the row order

Rich Radio Group.structure: bordered selectable row with RadioGroupItem (mirror Rich Checkbox Group)

Rich Switch Group.structure: bordered selectable row with Switch (mirror Rich Checkbox Group)

Select & Combobox.structure: UX-intent rule (§4.2): pick-from-list → <Select><SelectTrigger><SelectValue/></SelectTrigger><SelectContent>…</SelectContent></Select>; type-to-filter → <Combobox options value onValueChange/> from @coherence/design-system/ui/combobox

Icon.note: Icon / <name> → lucide-react PascalCase import as a child
Icon / <name> → lucide-react PascalCase import as a child

Skeleton.structure: <Skeleton className="h-4 w-[…]"/> — size from frame geometry

Sonner.structure: <Toaster/> mounted once + toast(…) calls — §6: NEVER fire toasts on crash/error paths

Icon.note: Icon / <name> → lucide-react PascalCase import as a child

Show dismiss.note: true → trailing dismiss X (lucide XIcon via the showDismiss prop); pair with onDismiss to make it interactive

checkbox field (react).note: Bordered checkbox 'chip' (Figma 'Phy' / 'Show marks' toolbar fields). No Figma twin yet — reconciles the chip's unofficial/* border/fill to input-border/input-background.

stepper (react).note: Bordered '− value +' numeric nudge (raw-trace window/speed/gain steppers). No Figma twin yet — reconciles the Figma clusters' unofficial/* tokens to input-*.

Focus.note: focus-visible ring — baked in; never a prop

Active.note: the selected trigger — set Tabs value/defaultValue

Icon.note: Icon / <name> → lucide-react PascalCase import as a child

Table Header.structure: <TableHead> with text / sortable button / checkbox content

Tabs.note: code-only: tabsListVariants variant="line" (underline style) has no Figma twin yet

Focus.note: focus-visible ring — baked in; never a prop

Error Focus.note: focus ring in error state — baked in (aria-invalid + focus-visible)

Round.note: No code equivalent — the kit is rounded-md only. Flag to the user; do not approximate with rounded-round.

Left.note: grouped toggles → wrap in <ToggleGroup> + <ToggleGroupItem>; position is automatic

Middle.note: grouped toggles → wrap in <ToggleGroup> + <ToggleGroupItem>; position is automatic

Right.note: grouped toggles → wrap in <ToggleGroup> + <ToggleGroupItem>; position is automatic

Single.note: grouped toggles → wrap in <ToggleGroup> + <ToggleGroupItem>; position is automatic

Focus.note: focus-visible ring — baked in; never a prop

Round.note: No code equivalent — the kit is rounded-md only. Flag to the user; do not approximate with rounded-round.

⮑ Left icon.note: Icon / <name> → lucide-react PascalCase import as a child

⮑ Right icon.note: Icon / <name> → lucide-react PascalCase import as a child

Toggle Icon Button.note: Toggle with a single icon child (no label). Sizes/Skin/Active? follow the Toggle Button entry.

VizCard (react).note: workstation custom (visualization chrome); no Figma twin yet.

aspect-ratio (react).note: deferred — not in the Figma kit (CONVENTIONS §2).

collapsible (react).note: deferred — not in the Figma kit (§2). Sidebar expand/collapse uses it internally.

combobox (react).note: shares Figma 'Select & Combobox' — see that entry's §4.2 UX-intent rule.

context-menu (react).note: Figma models context menus via Menu / Menu Item; trigger differs in code only.

dropdown-menu (react).note: Figma models dropdowns via the shared Menu / Menu Item sets (see those entries).

input-group (react).note: deferred — Figma models decorations inside the Input set; input-group.tsx is the code composition surface.

bubble (react).note: Chat message bubble, 7 variants (June 2026 shadcn chat set). Re-architected to kit tokens — the upstream cn-* skin layer was dropped for inline cva. No Figma twin yet (CONVENTIONS §2).

message (react).note: Chat message row (avatar + header + content + footer; align start/end). June 2026 shadcn chat set, re-architected to kit tokens. No Figma twin yet (CONVENTIONS §2).

attachment (react).note: Chat file/media attachment chip; state (idle/uploading/processing/error/done) × size × orientation. June 2026 shadcn chat set, re-architected to kit tokens. No Figma twin yet (CONVENTIONS §2).

marker (react).note: In-thread marker / separator / section break (default/separator/border). June 2026 shadcn chat set, re-architected to kit tokens. No Figma twin yet (CONVENTIONS §2).

message-scroller (react).note: Autoscrolling chat viewport; scroll-anchoring behavior from @shadcn/react, styling re-architected to kit tokens (June 2026 chat set). No Figma twin yet (CONVENTIONS §2).

menubar (react).note: no Figma twin; compose from Menu pieces if a design shows one — STOP and confirm.

popover (react).note: React-only by design (§2); Figma's Date Picker/Menu compositions imply it. No Figma component set.

text (react).note: maps to Figma TEXT STYLES (heading-1…body-xs), not a component set — see the typography system / <Text variant>.

toggle-group (react).note: deferred — Figma models grouping via Toggle Button Position; ToggleGroup is the code surface.
